title: paraphlomis albida var. brevidens
intro: Paraphlomis albida var. brevidens, also known as Chinese Lizard Tail, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions of China and Southeast Asia. Traditionally, it has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and soothing respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Paraphlomis albida var. brevidens is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional.
